name: Rectangle Vessel Tree (Single)
pi: Etienne Jessen, Marc C. Steinbach, Charlotte Debbaut, Dominik Schillinger
institution: Technical University of Darmstadt, Institute of Mechanics
Leibniz Universität Hannover, Institute of Applied Mathematics
description: Synthetic hepatic vascular tree on a rectangular perfusion domain, generated by rigorous mathematical optimization (CCO + NLP).
